raw.name: Tanner's  Jam
raw.description:
Tanner’s Jam is a premium natural herbal spread made from carefully selected Avaram Poo (Cassia Auriculata) flowers, known for their traditional wellness benefits and delicate floral taste. Crafted with a focus on purity and authenticity, this unique jam offers a refreshing alternative to regular fruit-based spreads.

Prepared using fresh flower petals and natural ingredients, Tanner’s Jam delivers a smooth texture and mild floral sweetness that enhances everyday meals. It is made without added artificial preservatives, synthetic colors, or flavors, ensuring a clean and natural product suitable for modern, health-conscious consumers.

New Launches.title: Rose Gulkhand Jam
New Launches.description: Discover the sweet floral taste of Rose Gulkhand Jam, made from handpicked Damask rose petals. A natural, digestive-friendly spread with traditional Ayurvedic benefits.

raw.name: Rose Gulkhand Jam
raw.description:
Rose Gulkhand Jam – A Floral Indulgence in Every Spoon!

Crafted from handpicked Damask rose petals and slow-cooked to perfection, our Rose Gulkhand Jam is a fragrant, rich fusion of tradition and taste. Blending the timeless Ayurvedic goodness of Gulkhand with the smooth, spreadable texture of a fruit jam, this delightful preserve is both a treat for the senses and a boost for your well-being.

Naturally sweetened and free from artificial additives, it’s perfect as a spread on toast, a swirl in desserts, or a soothing spoonful straight from the jar.

Benefits:
✨ Cooling and refreshing
✨ Supports digestion
✨ Uplifts mood with every floral bite
raw.shortDescription: Discover the sweet floral taste of Rose Gulkhand Jam, made from handpicked Damask rose petals. A natural, digestive-friendly spread with traditional Ayurvedic benefits.

New Launches.title: Super Negin Saffron
New Launches.description: Indulge in the ultimate luxury with our Super Neigin saffron, known for its exquisite golden strands, exceptional potency, and rich aromatic profile.

raw.name: Super Negin Saffron
raw.description:
Experience the finest grade of saffron with our Super Negin Saffron – handpicked, vividly red, and powerfully fragrant. Known for its long, thick stigmas and unmatched potency, Super Negin saffron offers intense color strength, deep flavor, and high crocin content, making it the most premium cut of saffron available.

We select only the boldest strands from the saffron flower, ensuring every thread you receive is pure, unbroken, and rich in essential oils. Ideal for gourmet cooking, traditional sweets, luxury beverages, or wellness blends.

✔ Extra-long stigmas
✔ No yellow styles, no fillers
✔ Highest coloring and flavoring power
raw.shortDescription: Indulge in the ultimate luxury with our Super Neigin saffron, known for its exquisite golden strands, exceptional potency, and rich aromatic profile.

New Launches.title: Kashmiri Mongra
New Launches.description: Experience the essence of Kashmir with our prized Kashmiri Mongra saffron, renowned for its deep red threads, distinct flavor, and unparalleled fragrance.

raw.name: Kashmiri Mongra
raw.description:
Kashmiri Mongra Saffron – Bold, Aromatic & Authentic
Discover the essence of Kashmir with our premium Mongra Saffron, hand-harvested from the pristine valleys of Pampore. Renowned for its deep crimson threads, strong aroma, and rich flavor, Kashmiri Mongra saffron contains high levels of crocin, safranal, and picrocrocin, delivering vibrant color, therapeutic benefits, and exquisite taste.

We sun-dry the stigmas to preserve their natural oils and potency. With thick, short strands and unmatched purity, this saffron is perfect for traditional Indian sweets, kesar milk, biryani, wellness drinks, and Ayurvedic use.

✔ 100% pure and unadulterated
✔ Naturally dried, handpicked threads
✔ Authentic GI-tagged Kashmiri origin
raw.shortDescription: Experience the essence of Kashmir with our prized Kashmiri Mongra saffron, renowned for its deep red threads, distinct flavor, and unparalleled fragrance.
